[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001001 2
1 0000111 3
2 1000110 3
3 1101011 5
4 0101011 4
5 0001001 2
6 1001000 2
7 0111111 6

01 10 1111111 a
12 21 1111011 6
23 32 0111011 5
34 43 0101011 4 match 4
45 54 1001001 3
56 65 1111111 a
67 76 1111111 a
70 07 1111111 a

02 20 1011111 6
13 31 1111011 6
24 42 0011011 4
35 53 1101011 5 match 3
46 64 0111111 6 match 7
57 75 1111000 4
60 06 1111111 a
71 17 1111001 5

03 30 1101111 6
14 41 1111001 5
25 52 1011011 5
36 63 0111111 6 match 7
47 74 1111001 5
50 05 1001111 5
61 16 1111111 a
72 27 1111011 6

04 40 1001111 5
15 51 1111001 5
26 62 0111111 6 match 7
37 73 1111011 6
